// Perspective expression — probe for propertyTree.update() / operate() formats
//
// Paste into Markdown component props.source (requires escapeHtml: false).
// Open DevTools Console with Preserve Log ON.
//
// What it probes:
//   Q2: What argument format does params.update() expect? Dumps source, tries
//       calling with null / {} / [] / {type,key,value} / {version,updates} /
//       ArrayBuffer to see which error messages give away the expected format.
//   Q3: Same for params.operate() — tries empty string, 'write:x=1', JSON blob.
//   Also: dumps params.readKeys(), readEncoded(), export(), toPlainObject()
//         to see the "encoded" format from the encoding side.
//
// Reaches page.views via window.__client (confirmed 8.3.6 by Probe 1).
// No fiber walk required.



concat(
  '<div id="recon-output" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0a0a18;color:#88ee88;padding:10px;height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;border-radius:4px">Running Probe 2...</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">')
